name: libmdbsql3t64
title: libmdbsql3t64
description:
mdbtools SQL library
Libraries built on libmdb to provide a SQL engine for reading
JET / MS Access database (MDB) files.
.
See mdb-sql util in mdbtools package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmdbsql3t64 because mdbtools SQL library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmdbsql3t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmdbsql3t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmdbsql3t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
